# Test Prompts for Vectora CLI Tests
# One prompt per line

What is Vectora and what can it do?
Explain how AI agents work
How does RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation) improve LLM responses?
What are the best practices for prompt engineering?
Compare Claude, GPT-4, and Gemini models
Explain vector embeddings and similarity search
What is the purpose of MCP (Model Context Protocol)?
How does streaming improve user experience in AI applications?
Describe the architecture of a modern AI coding assistant
What are the advantages of using local LLMs vs cloud APIs?
How does caching improve performance in AI applications?
Explain error recovery strategies in distributed systems
What is operational transformation and when is it useful?
How does offline-first design benefit user experience?
Describe WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility standards
What are the benefits of type-safe code?
Explain the differences between REST and RPC protocols
How does rate limiting protect APIs?
What are the key components of a CI/CD pipeline?
Describe the benefits of multi-language support in applications
